sections.paragraph:
Ζηνᾶς, acc. -ᾶν, ὁ (IMagnMai 323; Preisigke, Namenbuch) Zenas, a Christian and νομικός (q.v. 2) Tit 3:13.—LGPN I. M-M.

acc. acc. = accusative

IMagnMai IMagnMai = Die Inschriften von Magnesia am Mäander—Lists 3

Preisigke, Namenbuch Preisigke, Namenbuch = Namenbuch 1922

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

LGPN LGPN = A Lexicon of Greek Personal Names—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 428
